title: Exercise counseling documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports personalised activity goals, progress and follow-up context for exercise counselling documentation; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.

referral.text: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Indication, current activity, function, symptoms, contraindications, preferences, readiness, goals, agreed activity, safety discussion and review plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for exercise counselling documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
